title: borreria palustris
intro: Borreria palustris, also known as swamp false buttonweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which are rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Borreria palustris include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and can also be used in salves or creams for topical application.
